subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who, through His All-Compelling Name, hath been dominant over all that is in the heavens and on earth, and through His Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی کان باسمه المهیمن مهیمنا علی من فی السموات و الارض و باسمه
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @personal instructions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
